summary: 8th pay commission: We take a look at the likely revision in house rent allowance (HRA) for central government employees across level 1 to 5 in X, Y and Z category cities based on suggested fitment factor.

title: Want to build ₹1 crore corpus in 10 years? Here is the monthly SIP you need
summary: The size of your mutual fund investment depends on two key factors: the rate of return and the amount of SIP. The higher the rate of return, the bigger the corpus.

title: Nifty India Consumption Index beats Nifty 50 over 3, 5, and 10 years: Here are the top 5 ETFs tracking the theme
summary: The Nifty India Consumption Index tracks 30 companies across sectors linked to India's consumption story, including FMCG, automobiles, telecom, and healthcare. Investors can access this theme through ETFs such as Nippon India ETF Nifty India Consumption and ICICI Pru Nifty India Consumption ETF.

title: EPFO 3.0: What has changed — Before vs after, updated rules, CITES project, online access and new features explained
summary: EPFO 3.0 enables members to withdraw up to 75% of their EPF balance via UPI, enhancing quick access to funds for various needs. The system upgrade allows for automatic account transfers when changing jobs and offers digital solutions for claims and account management, improving efficiency.

title: Credit score dropped despite paying on time? Here's how to get it corrected
summary: A sudden drop in your credit score isn't always caused by missed payments. Experts explain how to identify reporting errors, dispute incorrect entries and get your credit profile corrected.

title: ITR filing 2026: Here's what happens if you miss the July 31 deadline — 1% monthly interest, late fee and more
summary: The income tax return due date for most taxpayers is July 31, 2026. Late filing incurs penalties and addition interest if you have unpaid taxes. Check all other consequences of missing ITR due date here.

title: ITR filing 2026: Is it necessary to keep physical copies of digital tax documents? Expert explains
summary: ITR filing is now becoming increasingly paperless, but taxpayers must securely retain key digital tax documents. A tax expert explains which records to preserve, why backups matter, and how organised digital files can help during tax verification, assessments and future income tax notices.

title: DA hike: What are the types of Dearness Allowances, how they are calculated — explained
summary: Dearness Allowance is a percentage of employees' pay aimed at helping households manage the increased cost of living. For calculation purposes, it is separated into two categories: industrial and variable DA.

title: Only 30% of individual investors' mutual fund AUM is in direct plans: Why retail buyers still prefer regular route
summary: While direct plans make up 77.7% of institutional investors' mutual fund AUM, the corresponding share for individual investors is just 30%. Experts say the gap is driven by the need for professional advice and investor behaviour.&nbsp;

title: JSW Infrastructure among 7 stocks that hit 52-week highs and rallied up to 30% in a month

title: HCL Tech Q1 Results: Profit rises 20% YoY to Rs 4,624 crore; co declares Rs 12 dividend
